summary: WCAG 2.2 AAA baseline audit complete across 9 pages. Counting model: per-page incidence (one instance per affected page). Baseline: 6 critical, 14 major, 8 minor (28 total). 5 critical closed this dispatch; 1 critical open (graph SVG keyboard nav, A11Y-G01, Sprint 2). 3 major fully closed; 1 major partially closed (Gap 07 link contrast — global CSS fixed, per-page inline blocks open as A11Y-C02); 10 major open. Quick wins shipped: skip links on 8 pages, <main> landmark on 8 pages, global :focus-visible ring, --ochre-link token (7.14:1 AAA), always-on link underline, prefers-reduced-motion on customers + mcp (targeted selectors, no !important), nav aria-label on 4 pages. Also removed all !important declarations from 9 audited pages and global stylesheet (CLAUDE.md compliance); systemic !important across non-audited pages logged as A11Y-DS01 (Minor, design-system hygiene), Sprint 3. All changes in assets/styles.css (global) plus targeted page edits. Accessibility page v2.0 updated with O-1 commitment, full findings, roadmap, trend section, refusals, collaborators.
